audit.title: Audit / Advice offer
audit.description: Tell me about your site. I'll review your tracking and analytics setup and come back with a tailored strategy.
audit.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
audit.successMessage: Your website is now under audit. I will reach out to you via your email once I finish reviewing and implementing a strategy with a reasonable offer.
audit.linkedinPrompt: I'll be happy to have you as a connection through LinkedIn
audit.backHome: Take me back to the main page.

hero.subtitle: Marketing Data Infrastructure Engineer
hero.title1: I provide Server-side tracking and GA4 fixes
hero.description: I build tracking systems tailored for your needs. I reduce your data loss by bypass adblockers, fix the broken GA4 data, and I implement Server-Side tagging so your marketing campaigns actually works.

whoami.label: // WHO AM I
whoami.heading: Architecting the unseen.
whoami.bio1: I am a Data Engineer operating out of Normandie, France. Helping companies are bleeding 30% of their analytics to intelligent tracking prevention (ITP) and adblockers.
whoami.bio2: I build serverless infrastructures using GCP, advanced JavaScript, and SQL to capture every click. My mission is simple: fix your broken data pipelines so your marketing actually works.

highlight1.title: Server-Side Tagging
highlight1.desc: Routing data through secure cloud containers to bypass adblockers.

highlight2.title: GCP Infrastructure
highlight2.desc: Building robust, scalable data pipelines on Google Cloud.

highlight3.title: GA4 & CAPI Integration
highlight3.desc: Repairing broken analytics and engineering flawless server-to-server advertising payloads.

highlight4.title: Privacy Compliance
highlight4.desc: Strict adherence to European GDPR and DMA consent state architectures.

services.label: // Services
services.heading: What I Deliver
services.modalDescription: Leave your details and I'll reach out to discuss this service.
services.modalSuccess: Thanks for your interest in this service, I will reach out to you shortly to discuss further. Be sure to check your spam folder.

contact.label: // Contact
contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Contact me directly to put an end to being one of those companies that are losing 30% of their analytics to adblockers. I will build first-party, server-side tracking pipelines for you that will capture every click and bypass the noise. Let's fix your broken data.
contact.formMessage: Tell me about your data challenge...
contact.successTitle: I'll get back to you very soon
contact.successNote: Check your spam folder if you haven't received anything within 24 hours.

sandbox.label: // Lab
sandbox.title: JavaScript Sandbox
sandbox.description: Live-execution experiments. Each card runs in an isolated iframe — click to reveal and activate.
